name: UGC Creator
description: Create complete UGC videos: script, base image, multishot variations, voice, lip-sync, subtitles.

name: Content Analyzer
description: Analyze any video (TikTok, YouTube, Instagram) and extract: script, scene prompts, visual style. Then recreate similar content with your brand.

name: Video Ad Creator
description: Create cinematic video ads: storyboard, 10 keyframes, frame-to-frame animation with Kling, voiceover, music, and final render.

name: Static Ad
description: Create ready-to-publish static ads with product, copy, logo, and brand colors. Perfect for social media, display, and print.

name: Ad Creative Lab
description: Generate brand-consistent ad creatives from reference images. Upload references, analyze visual style, generate multiple variations, iterate.

name: Product Spotlight
description: Professional product photography in context. Place your product in any setting with studio-quality lighting and composition.

name: Fashion Editorial
description: High-end fashion editorial photography. Avatar + garments + pose direction with professional lighting and styling.

name: Fashion Reels
description: Outfit-transition reels: same model, same spot, multiple looks. Multishot generation + Kling animation for fashion content.

name: Product Photos
description: Generate multiple creative product photo variations from a base image.

name: Ad Creative
description: Generate ad creatives with copy, images, and brand composition.

name: Social Post
description: Generate captions and images for social media posts.

name: Reel Creator
description: Create short-form video reels with scenes, music, and subtitles.

name: Background Remover
description: Remove background from product photos using AI segmentation.
